# Welcome {#welcome}

This sample Quarto book demonstrates section-level course coverage tracking.

## How to use this sample {#sec-how-to-use}

Use the dropdown to pick a section as a student. Add `?prof` (or `?prof=true`) to the URL to enable professor mode and select sections with checkboxes.

## Reading plan {#sec-reading-plan}

In this sample, some sections are marked as covered for one section and not the other so you can observe different highlighting states.

## Course goals {#sec-course-goals}

These learning goals apply to every section in the sample.

## Prerequisites {#sec-prerequisites}

Review algebra and trigonometry before the chapters on calculus topics.
